name: Config File Creation and Documentation
description: Create a JSON configuration file with database and feature flag settings, validate its contents, and generate markdown documentation

tasks.name: Create JSON configuration file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create a file named 'app_config.json'. The JSON content MUST include these exact fields: 'database_host' (string, e.g. 'localhost'), 'database_port' (integer, e.g. 5432), 'cache_ttl_seconds' (integer, e.g. 3600), and 'feature_flags' (object containing at least 2 boolean flags with descriptive names like 'enable_logging' and 'dark_mode'). Use realistic production-like values. After creating the file, output a confirmation message stating 'Created app_config.json with 4 configuration fields.'
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms app_config.json was created and explicitly mentions all 4 required field names: database_host, database_port, cache_ttl_seconds, and feature_flags

tasks.name: Read and validate configuration file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read 'app_config.json'. Output the FULL file contents verbatim (do NOT summarize as 'file was read'). Then you MUST call python_exec to write Python code that: 1) Parses the JSON string, 2) Validates that these required fields exist: database_host, database_port, cache_ttl_seconds, feature_flags, 3) Prints each field name, its type, and its value in a readable format. The Python code must print the validation results. Output format: First the raw JSON contents, then the Python validation output showing all field details.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the complete raw JSON file contents AND validation results explicitly showing all 4 field names (database_host, database_port, cache_ttl_seconds, feature_flags) with their actual values and types

tasks.name: Generate documentation markdown file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create 'config_docs.md'. Using the configuration field details from task_002's validation output, write a markdown documentation page with: 1) A level-1 header '# Configuration Documentation', 2) One level-2 header section for each of the 4 settings (database_host, database_port, cache_ttl_seconds, feature_flags), 3) Each section must include: the field name in a code block, the data type, the current value from task_002, and a 1-2 sentence description of what the setting controls. Use proper markdown formatting. After writing, output: 'Created config_docs.md documenting 4 configuration settings.'
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms config_docs.md was created and explicitly states it documents all 4 configuration fields identified in task_002
